title: dendroglossa zeylanica
intro: Dendroglossa zeylanica, also known as the Indian pipe plant, is a rare and unique perennial plant native to the Western Ghats in India. The plant is characterized by its waxy white stems and leaves that resemble a pipe, hence its name. The leaves of Dendroglossa zeylanica are rich in saponins, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. In herbal medicine, the plant is prepared into various forms such as decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
